hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.existsSync('SESSIONS.md')?fs.readFileSync('SESSIONS.md','utf8'):'(SESSIONS.md not found)';console.log('

---
SESSION TASK CONTEXT (from SESSIONS.md):
'+s+'---');"

node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const msg='Claude finished the task';try{if(process.platform==='win32'){execSync('powershell -Command \"[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName(\\\"System.Windows.Forms\\\");[System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show(\\\"'+msg+'\\\")\"');}else if(process.platform==='darwin'){execSync('osascript -e \'display notification \"'+msg+'\" with title \"Claude Code\"\'');}else{execSync('notify-send \"Claude Code\" \"'+msg+'\"');}}catch{console.log('[Claude Hook] '+msg);}"
